## How was this tested?

# commands run, output captured

## Checklist

- [ ] `shellcheck` passes on all changed `.sh` files
- [ ] `bash -n` passes on all changed files
- [ ] For new commands: `rcc <command> --help` works
- [ ] For Go changes: `cd ui && go build ./...` compiles
